zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane de Berkeley於1325年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾時，她的父親Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston32歲，母親Margaret Mortimer21歲。她於1337年1月17日與Thomas de Haudlo在英國史洛普爾阿克頓 伯奈爾結婚。她去世於1369年10月2日在英國素瑞素瓦可享年44歲，埋葬在英國素瑞素瓦可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane de Berkeley于1325年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston32岁，母亲Margaret Mortimer21岁。她于1337年1月17日与Thomas de Haudlo在英国史洛普爾阿克頓 伯奈爾结婚。她去世于1369年10月2日在英国素瑞素瓦可享年44岁，埋葬在英国素瑞素瓦可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joane de Berkeley was born in 1325, in Gloucestershire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston, was 32 and her mother, Margaret Mortimer, was 21. She married Thomas de Haudlo on 17 January 1337, in Acton Burnell, Shropshire, England. She died on 2 October 1369, in Southwark, Surrey, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in Southwark, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane de Berkeley est née en 1325, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret Mortimer, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Haudlo le 17 janvier 1337, à Acton Burnell, Shropshire, Angleterre. Elle est décédée le 2 octobre 1369, à Southwark, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Southwark, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joane de Berkeley 1325 in Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston 32 und ihre Mutter Margaret Mortimer 21. Sie hat am 17. Januar 1337 in Acton Burnell, Shropshire, England Thomas de Haudlo geheiratet. Sie starb am 2. Oktober 1369 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Southwark, Surrey, England und wurde in Southwark, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joane de Berkeley è nata il nel 1325 nel Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Margaret Mortimer, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Haudlo il 17 gennaio 1337, nel Acton Burnell, Shropshire, England. Morì il 2 ottobre 1369, nel Southwark, Surrey, England, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Southwark, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane de Berkeleyが1325年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Costonは32歳，母Margaret Mortimerは21歳であった。1337年1月17日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアアクトン ブルネルでThomas de Haudloと結婚した。彼女は1369年10月2日にイギリススリーソウスワークで44歳で死去し，イギリススリーソウスワークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane de Berkeley(이)가 1325년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Mortimer(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1337년 1월 17일 영국 슈럽실르 악턴 버넬에서 Thomas de Haudlo(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1369년 10월 2일 영국 수리 소우스워크에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 소우스워크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joane de Berkeley nasceu em 1325, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Mortimer, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Haudlo em 17 de janeiro de 1337, em Acton Burnell, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 2 de outubro de 1369, em Southwark, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Southwark, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane de Berkeley родилась в 1325 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Mortimer, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Haudlo 17 января 1337 г. в местности актон бурнелл, шропшир, Англия. Она умерла 2 октября 1369 г. в местности соутварк, сурри, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности соутварк, сурри, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joane de Berkeley nació en 1325, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margaret Mortimer, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Thomas de Haudlo el 17 de enero de 1337, en Acton Burnell, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 2 de octubre de 1369, en Southwark, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Southwark, Surrey, Inglaterra.
